isi.albums: L.O.V.E (Romantic) (Villain With A Crush X SAY MY NAME)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric SAY MY NAME - L.O.V.E (Romantic)

Romanization

Give me a sign
hetgallineun
ireon nae mam eotteokhae
jakkuman You make me smile
(You make me smile)

dugeunggeorineun mam
1bun 1choga
jamkkan meomchwosseo

uyeonin geolkka
ummyeongin geolkka
You’re so fantastic

All I wanna ask is
L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and

The L.O.V.E Romantic
Just let me
Fall fall fall fall in love

saljjak seuchin ne sonkkeute
ttwineun simjang neon alkka
eonjena You make me fly
(You make me fly)

dugeunggeorineun mam
1bun 1choga
jamkkan meomchwosseo

uyeonin geolkka
ummyeongin geolkka
You‘re my destiny

All I wanna ask is
L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and

The L.O.V.E romantic
Just let me
Fall fall fall fall in love

jogeum eosaekhan oneul
You and me
sasil eojireojilhae
Stay with me

uri dul, seollemeul neomeoseo
Fall fall fall in

L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and

The L.O.V.E Romantic
Just let me
Fall fall fall fall in love

L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and more and

So, tell me when you came to My heart
Fall fall fall in




Hangeul

Give me a sign
헷갈리는
이런 내 맘 어떡해
자꾸만 You make me smile
(You make me smile)

두근거리는 맘
1분 1초가
잠깐 멈췄어

우연인 걸까
운명인 걸까
You’re so fantastic

All I wanna ask is
L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and

The L.O.V.E Romantic
Just let me
Fall fall fall fall in love

살짝 스친 네 손끝에
뛰는 심장 넌 알까
언제나 You make me fly
(You make me fly)

두근거리는 맘
1분 1초가
잠깐 멈췄어

우연인 걸까
운명인 걸까
You‘re my destiny

All I wanna ask is
L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and

The L.O.V.E romantic
Just let me
Fall fall fall fall in love

조금 어색한 오늘
You and me
사실 어질어질해
Stay with me

우리 둘, 설렘을 넘어서
Fall fall fall in

L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and

The L.O.V.E Romantic
Just let me
Fall fall fall fall in love

L.O.V.E Romantic
Can't stop me, like you love you miss you
More and more and more and

So, tell me when you came to My heart
Fall fall fall in
